strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning web, mobile, and embedded
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated
React experience present but not deeply emphasized across recent roles

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin signal

response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience, current AI-agent/MCP work directly matching the role, and strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev). React, MongoDB, Docker, and cloud (AWS CDK) are all present. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js and limited recent Kotlin/Java, but these are learnable given the demonstrated polyglot ability.
